properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 26/19 

1.     THE SECOND ROLL OVER OF THE GPS SYSTEM WEEK CLOCK CYCLE WILL OCCUR 060000 UTC APR 19.OLDER GPS RECEIVERS WITHOUT FIRMWARE UPDATES MIGHT BE AFFECTED AND GIVE INCORRECT TIME AND POSITION INFORMATION. 
USERS OF OLDER GPS RECEIVERS ARE ADVISED TO CONSULT THEIR GPS MANUFACTURER.
2.     CANCEL THIS MSG 062359 UTC APR 19.
